title: Simple Lifesteal
description: A simple, bare-bones Lifesteal datapack, for homemade Lifesteal servers.
body:
# WELCOME!
Simple Lifesteal is a bare-bones Lifesteal datapack. Made to play with friends, it handles everything you need to start up a lifesteal server. Made to be simple, any changes are simple to implement to this datapack.

Hearts can be crafted with the recipe in the gallery.
Your health bar is limited to 20 hearts, but you can hold more than that.

Type "/trigger withdraw.heart" to take a heart out of your health bar and gain it as an item.

### Settings
There are a couple settings you can change with the following commands:
- /function gamertagon 
  - Turns on a Hearts display underneath the player's name (Default)
- /function gamertagon
  - Turns off a Hearts display underneath the player's name
 
- /function tabliston
  - Turns on a Hearts display on the tab list
- /function tablistoff
  - Turns off a Hearts display on the tab list (Default)
